refine ⟨?_, ?_⟩
  · intro x hx
    by_contra hxb
    have hxk : x ∈ Knight := by
      simpa [Finset.mem_singleton, hxb] using hx
    have hxkn : x ∈ Knave := by
      have : x ∈ Knight ∨ x ∈ Knave := by
        simpa [knight_or_knave x] using (knight_or_knave x)
      cases this with
      | inl hxk' =>
          exact False.elim (by
            have : x ∈ Knight ∧ x ∈ Knave := by
              exact ⟨hxk', (by
                have : ¬ x ∈ Knight := by
                  intro hxk''
                  exact hxb (by
                    -- from singleton membership we deduce x = B
                    have : x = B := by
                      -- use subset equality from hx and BKnight contradiction: impossible
                      -- but we can directly get x = B by showing mem singleton
                      have : x ∈ ({B} : Finset Inhabitant) := by
                        simpa [Finset.mem_singleton, hxb] using hx
                      simpa [Finset.mem_singleton] using this
                    exact this) )
                exact (by
                  -- knave from not knight using knight_or_knave
                  have : x ∈ Knight ∨ x ∈ Knave := by
                    simpa [knight_or_knave x] using (knight_or_knave x)
                  cases this with
                  | inl hxk'' => contradiction
                  | inr hxkn => exact hxkn)⟩
            exact this.1.elim))
      | inr hxkn =>
          exact hxkn
    exact (knight_knave_disjoint hxk hxkn).elim
  · exact BKnight
